method: external supplemental risk signals (supply/guarantee/management DD) + autofill from MOLIT trade/rent public panel

meta.method: external supplemental risk signals (supply/guarantee/management DD) + autofill from MOLIT trade/rent public panel

guide.value_range: 0~100 (또는 0~1 비율 입력 가능, 내부에서 자동 변환)
guide.district_signals: key=자치구명, value={supply_pressure, guarantee_risk, management_dd_risk, confidence, source, flags}
guide.complex_signals: key=구::단지명, district 미입력 시 complex에는 구 시그널 fallback 적용
